comments.LineComment: | Brush Tip Types — Core type definitions for brush tips.
| This module defines the fundamental TipShape ADT representing the
| categorical shape of a brush tip. Each shape produces fundamentally

value.value: Circular or elliptical tip, the most versatile
Rectangular tip for bold, flat strokes
Multiple bristle groups for blending and textures
Angled flat tip for calligraphy and lettering
Multiple parallel lines, like a comb
